summary: Completed testing of CitySelector showDemand feature and SearchPage empty state improvements. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%) and all frontend UI tests passed. The CitySelector correctly fetches cities with businesses, shows green badges with counts, and sorts by demand. SearchPage shows dynamic empty state messages based on city/query filters with 'Limpiar filtros' button and CTA to register business.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cities?country_code=MX&with_businesses=true returns only cities with businesses - PASSED
Backend: Cities with businesses are sorted by business_count descending - PASSED
Backend: CDMX has 3+ businesses in the response - PASSED
Backend: Regular cities endpoint returns all seeded cities - PASSED
Backend: Cities include state field for auto-fill functionality - PASSED
Backend: Search with city=Monterrey&query=Fitness returns empty array - PASSED
Backend: Search with only city=Monterrey returns empty array - PASSED
Backend: Search with non-existent query returns empty array - PASSED
Backend: Search with city=CDMX returns businesses - PASSED
Backend: Search without filters returns all businesses - PASSED
Frontend: SearchPage with city=Monterrey&q=Fitness shows 'No hay negocios de Fitness en Monterrey' - PASSED
Frontend: SearchPage with only city=Monterrey shows 'Aún no hay negocios en Monterrey' - PASSED
Frontend: SearchPage with only query shows 'No encontramos resultados para [query]' - PASSED
Frontend: 'Limpiar filtros' button clears URL filters and shows all businesses - PASSED
Frontend: CTA button '¿Tienes un negocio? Regístralo aquí' navigates to /business/register - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: CitySelector.jsx correctly implements showDemand prop (lines 32-35) - fetches both regular cities AND with_businesses=true
CitySelector.jsx correctly creates demandMap from with_businesses response (lines 40-42)
CitySelector.jsx correctly sorts cities by demand when showDemand=true (lines 57-59)
CitySelector.jsx correctly shows green badge with TrendingUp icon for cities with businesses (lines 134-139)
CitySelector.jsx correctly passes full city object via onCityData callback (line 65)
BusinessRegisterPage.jsx correctly uses CitySelector with showDemand and onCityData props (lines 675-686)
BusinessRegisterPage.jsx correctly auto-fills state field when city is selected (lines 679-683)
SearchPage.jsx correctly shows dynamic empty state messages based on city/query filters (lines 396-410)
SearchPage.jsx correctly shows 'Limpiar filtros' button with data-testid='clear-filters-btn' (lines 419-423)
SearchPage.jsx correctly shows CTA button with data-testid='register-business-empty-cta' (lines 425-433)

mocked_api_note.Cloudinary: Falls back to Emergent Object Storage

test_credentials: No credentials needed - tested public pages and APIs
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data (CDMX with 3 businesses, test with 1, Test City with 1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CitySelector showDemand and SearchPage empty state features are fully implemented and tested. Key points: (1) CitySelector with showDemand=true fetches both /api/cities and /api/cities?with_businesses=true, (2) Cities are sorted by business_count descending when showDemand=true, (3) Green badges with TrendingUp icon show business counts, (4) onCityData callback passes full city object including state for auto-fill, (5) SearchPage shows dynamic messages: 'No hay negocios de [query] en [city]' for both filters, 'Aún no hay negocios en [city]' for city only, 'No encontramos resultados para [query]' for query only, (6) 'Limpiar filtros' button clears all filters, (7) CTA button navigates to /business/register
